author: rthomasv3
name: Galdr.Native App (rthomasv3)
description: Personal Galdr.Native desktop app starter: Vue 3 (Composition API, JavaScript), Tailwind CSS v4, auto-imported Lucide icons, system/light/dark theming, and file logging. .NET 10 with AOT.

postActions.description: Next steps to run your Galdr app.

manualInstructions.text: Debug (hot reload):  1) cd FrontEnd && npm install && npm run dev   2) in another shell: dotnet run -c Debug
Release (one shot):  dotnet run -c Release   (the build compiles the front end and stages it as wwwroot)
